research_question: Does size (log_mkt_cap) and/or industry (SW L1) neutralization of reversal_5d PERCENT_RANK improve IC and full-chain performance over un-neutralized baseline and p98?

success_rules.core_pass_condition: At least one neutralized candidate shows validation IC >= p98 validation IC (0.012) AND full-chain annual_relative_return >= p98 (-0.129)
